name: set-overlap-analysis
description: Deterministic Venn and UpSet overlap chart workflow for CSV and Excel datasets.

interface.shortDescription: Run deterministic Venn and UpSet overlap charts.
interface.longDescription: CSV and Excel workflow for set-overlap analysis. It inspects item and set columns, applies explicit recipe filters, optionally selects a period, prepares deterministic set membership and intersection source data, renders Venn charts for two or three sets and UpSet charts for larger overlap structures, and writes context, audit, source-pack, CSV and chart artifacts for Codex interpretation.
defaultPrompt: Use Set Overlap Analysis on the CSV or Excel file I provide.

Inspect the columns, ask only for unresolved item/set/period mappings, run deterministic Venn and UpSet overlap analysis, write chart artifacts, context data, audit and source pack, then interpret the most important intersections from the structured source data.
